props.title: Composite dashboard
props.children: JSON drives Tabs, SplitPane, API-backed Table + Pagination, regional Table with column filters, Recharts gallery (area, composed, scatter, radar, funnel, treemap, sankey, radial bar, bar, line, pie) with tooltips and legend toggles, MultiSelect-bound state, Accordion, TreeView, Modal, and host hooks — no repeat/map node; arrays live in state.
